sglang.title: [Refactor] Auto-derive CLI args from dataclass fields to eliminate duplication
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add Arg descriptor and add_cli_args_from_dataclass() utility in python/sglang/srt/arg_groups/arg_utils.py that auto-generates argparse arguments from Annotated[T, Arg(...)] field metadata
Each argument is now defined once instead of twice (dataclass field + add_cli_args), eliminating ~3000

sglang.title: Cap SWA pool sizing with chunk cache
sglang.author: cctry
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
When chunk cache is enabled, cap the max in-window (SWA) tokens proportional to the max number of active requests instead of using ratio-based sizing. This tightens the SWA pool and redirects the freed KV budget to the full pool.

Other changes

Replace SGLANG_SWA_EVICTION_INTERVAL_MULTIPLIE

sglang.title: [Spec] Split init_backends; account draft weights in --mem-fraction-static
sglang.author: cctry
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Follow-up to #23862 addressing review feedback.

Split the catch-all init_backends into init_attention_backends() + init_cuda_graphs(), run as two scheduler phases; the per-runner flag is now the positive capture_decode_cuda_graph.
The KV pool is profiled after all weights are loaded, so draft weigh

sglang.title: Fix H20 torch import reinstall fallback
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes the H20 dependency install failure where the script tried to import torch before deciding whether to force-reinstall torch packages. If the CUDA-version probe import fails, the install now logs the import traceback and falls through to the existing force-reinstall path.
Validation:

Reproduced

sglang.title: CI: Pin flash-attn-4 for diffusion CI consistency
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Pin flash-attn-4 to 4.0.0b15 instead of leaving it as >=4.0.0b9.
Root Cause
PR #28811 only sorted python/pyproject.toml, but it changed the CI dependency resolution outcome for the B200 multimodal generation job. The affected CI jobs show that the previously passing runs installed:

flash-at

sglang.title: [codex] Fix SANA-WM CFG-parallel tensor devices
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Move SANA-WM scheduler tensors and denoising timesteps to the local rank device under CFG-parallel execution.
Add focused unit coverage for scheduler tensor device migration.

Root Cause
Under 2-GPU CFG parallel, local latents can live on rank-local devices while scheduler tensors remain on

sglang.title: [diffusion] Bound DiffGenerator local cleanup
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add per-call scheduler receive timeout support.
Bound local DiffGenerator.shutdown() scheduler shutdown waits and force terminate/kill local workers when needed.
Make DiffGenerator.__del__ avoid issuing a blocking scheduler request during garbage collection.

Root Cause
After a failed dynam

sglang.title: Pass DSA topk through PP warmup proxy buffers
sglang.author: mmangkad
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fixes #28659 as a tiny follow-up to #28532 after #28740 moved autotune to runner-owned dummy buffers, adding topk_indices to those PP warmup proxy buffers too for GLM-5.2 DSA splits.
It also avoids asking for top-k on short extend batches that take the dense MHA path, since that path does no

sglang.title: [Bugfix] Fix MTP acceptance regression on plan stream by moving int64 cast before plan stream context
sglang.author: iridiumine
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Closes #28405, #28406.
PR #28043 fixed a DeepSeek-V4 DP dtype mismatch hang by normalizing predict to torch.int64 inside prepare_for_draft_extend . However, when the overlap plan stream is enabled, this cast executes on the plan stream while predict is produced on the main stream, creatin

sglang.title: [BugFix] NCCL deadlock in HiCache writing_check by making all_reduce unconditional
sglang.author: jeremyzhang866
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix NCCL deadlock in HiCache writing_check under TP>1 with write_through policy.
writing_check short-circuits with return when ongoing_write_through is empty, skipping the all_reduce. The code assumes all ranks have identical state, but loading_check processes
DMA completions independentl

sglang.title: [misc] Make NaN-logit sanitization opt-in (default off)
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
sanitize_nan_logits runs an in-place nan_to_num_ over the [batch, vocab]
logits on every sampler step. With a clean model this is pure overhead on the
sampler hot path, and it measurably lowers single-batch decode occupancy. Make
it opt-in: off by default, enabled with SGLANG_SANITIZE_NAN

sglang.title: [Spec] Support FlashInfer CUDA graph for EAGLE draft-extend
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Run the EAGLE draft-extend forward as a captured CUDA graph for FlashInfer (add FlashInferAttnBackend to the draft-extend graph whitelist), replacing eager per-layer launches.
~10% online median E2E latency improvement (request-rate 8, Llama-2-7B EAGLE topk=4); accept length unchanged.

Cha

sglang.title: [Feature] Add graceful scheduler shutdown; free hisparse host buffer on exit
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: The scheduler previously had no graceful-shutdown path — it was always SIGKILL'd, so its resources were reclaimed by the kernel. This adds a ShutdownReq control message that breaks the event loop (broadcast across TP ranks, so they stop in lockstep) and releases resources in userspace via a release_

sglang.title: [Spec] Enable FR-Spec in EAGLE draft-extend CUDA graph by sizing logits buffer from the draft head
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: FR-Spec (--speculative-token-map) injects the reduced draft vocab via a late json_model_override_args, so the draft model's hf_config lacks hot_vocab_size and the draft-extend CUDA graph sized next_token_logits_buffer to the full vocab — mismatching the reduced head (graph capture crashed, so FlashI

sglang.title: Fix Qwen MoE precision issue with PP and all-reduce fusion
sglang.author: 1e4ves
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fixes #27744
This is a small patch to fix the Qwen MoE precision issue when pipeline parallelism is used together with tensor
parallelism and FlashInfer all-reduce fusion.
When all-reduce fusion is enabled, the post-expert all-reduce can be deferred and fused into the next layer's
prepare

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Defer offload reads while transfers are pending
vllm.author: Palaiologos1453
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #46014.
This makes the offloading scheduler defer prefix-cache lookup for a request while that request still has in-flight transfer jobs. In the preemption/re-admission race described in the issue, this prevents the scheduler from issuing a load while a previously flushed store is still tracke

vllm.title: [ROCm][P/D] Support MiniMax-M3 mixed KV layouts in MoRIIO READ mode
vllm.author: junkang1991
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix MoRIIO READ-mode KV transfer when a model uses mixed per-layer KV cache layouts, observed with MiniMax-M3.
MiniMax-M3 registers multiple KV cache layouts:

separated K/V cache: [2, num_blocks, block_size, num_kv_heads, head_dim]
ROCm interleaved K/V cache: [num_blocks, 2, block_size, num

vllm.title: [Disagg] return routed_experts on streaming generate responses
vllm.author: aoshen02
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
The disagg serve_tokens non-streaming path already returns per-token MoE
routing in GenerateResponseChoice.routed_experts, but the streaming path
(GenerateResponseStreamChoice) dropped it. This adds the field to the
streaming choice and encodes it with the same base64(np.save(...))
transport

vllm.title: [Spec Decode] Support mixed KV page sizes for DFlash
vllm.author: pst2154
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR addresses the KV-cache infrastructure gap needed by DFlash-style speculative decoding when the target and draft models have different KV page sizes.
It adds:

A padding fallback in unify_kv_cache_spec_page_size for non-divisible page sizes.
Padded KV-cache reshape handling for FlashA

vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The root cause is that torch.compile can't fuse these torch glue ops, which leads to the M25 perf regression. This PR fuses these torch ops manually with Triton.

vllm.title: [Multimodal] Add Qwen2-VL/Qwen2.5-VL processor-mapped video loader
vllm.author: WindChimeRan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Qwen2-VL and Qwen2.5-VL currently fall back to the generic opencv video loader (uniform num_frames=32) because they ship no video_processor_type in their preprocessor config.
This adds Qwen2VLVideoBackend, so the loader is auto-selected (#44126). Same pattern as the Qwen3-VL loader (#44412).

vllm.title: [Kernel][Bugfix] Fix INT8 per-token-head KV cache rounding in Triton reshape-and-cache
vllm.author: Zedong-Liu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
What this PR does
This PR fixes the Triton reshape-and-cache path for kv_cache_dtype=int8_per_token_head.
The per-token-head KV cache kernel computes one absmax scale per (token, head), but the INT8 path previously clamped the scaled K/V values and then relied on the implicit float-to-int8 store. Th

vllm.title: [Spec Decode] Add Qwen3 architecture support for EAGLE3
vllm.author: benchislett
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
As proven by DFlash, the Qwen3 base architecture is more stable for EAGLE3 training due to the extra norms in the attention module. We can improve performance of EAGLE3 and P-EAGLE by using Qwen3 as a base architecture and leveraging the higher learning rates now possible in training. I have

Route non-causal DFlash batches through F

vllm.title: [Bugfix] [Rust Frontend] Fix stop string truncation with repeated matches
vllm.author: reidliu41
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix a Rust frontend stop-string truncation bug when the same stop string appears multiple times within the newly decoded text.
The Rust implementation used rposition() in matches_stop_string(), which selected the rightmost match in the search window.  Python V1 detokenization uses find(), wh

vllm.title: [Frontend] Refactor ServingTokenization entrypoint.
vllm.author: noooop
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
following #41907
Refactor ServingTokenization entrypoint.

Remove the "OpenAI" prefix.


In the early days of vLLM (2023), there was only the OpenAI, so vLLM online serving was referred to as the OpenAI-Compatible Server.

Remove the "OpenAI" prefix if this is not the official OpenAI API.

O

vllm.title: [1/N][Core] add partial prefix cache primitives
vllm.author: ZJY0516
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR is the first, intentionally small, step toward fine-grained prefix cache hits for hybrid models.
Hybrid full-attention + Mamba models often need the full-attention cache block size to align with the Mamba state block size. Since vLLM prefix-cache matching is block-size granular today

vllm.title: [CPUOffloadingManager] Maintain evictable list in LRUCachePolicy
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add evictable list to LRUCachePolicy for fast evictions.
Why
vllm serve command :
KV_TRANSFER_CONFIG=$(cat <<EOF
{
  "kv_connector": "OffloadingConnector",
  "kv_role": "kv_both",
  "kv_connector_extra_config": {
    "spec_name": "TieringOffloadingSpec",
    "cpu_bytes_to_use": 429496729600,
